content.cn_text: Driver：你好，我是 John Blake。
content.en_text: Driver: Hi there, I'm John Blake.

content.cn_text: 我的一个朋友推荐了你们的服务。
content.en_text: A friend of mine recommended your service.

content.cn_text: 我需要帮助。
content.en_text: I'm in need of assistance.

content.cn_text: 我朋友说你们有拖车，可以安全拖车。
content.en_text: My friend mentioned that you have tow trucks capable of safely pulling cars.

content.cn_text: Operator：很高兴认识你，John。
content.en_text: Operator: Nice to meet you, John.

content.cn_text: 在继续之前，我们需要你的联系方式来填写服务表并派出工作人员。
content.en_text: Before we proceed, we'll need your contact details to fill out our service form and dispatch our staff.

content.cn_text: Driver：当然。
content.en_text: Driver: Sure.

content.cn_text: 我住在 Salisbury 的 116 Charlecote Road。
content.en_text: I live at 116, Charlecote Road in Salisbury.
C-H-A-R-L-E-C-O-T-E. C-H-A-R-L-E-C-O-T-E。

content.cn_text: Operator：谢谢你提供地址，John。
content.en_text: Operator: Thank you for providing your address, John.

content.cn_text: 这有助于我们更新你的信息。
content.en_text: This will help us keep your information up to date.

content.cn_text: 你也可以提供邮编吗？这样我们可以通过邮件发送详细服务信息。
content.en_text: Could you also provide me with your postcode so that we can send you detailed service information by email?

content.cn_text: Driver：我的邮编是 SE13AL。
content.en_text: Driver: My postcode is SE13AL.

content.cn_text: Operator：很好，我们记下了。
content.en_text: Operator: Perfect, we have that noted down.

content.cn_text: 现在，请告诉我你的汽车品牌好吗？
content.en_text: Now, could you please let me know the make of your car?

content.cn_text: 这会帮助我们派出有相关经验的机械师。
content.en_text: This will help us send mechanics with relevant experience.

content.cn_text: Driver：我开的是 Honda Accord。
content.en_text: Driver: I drive a Honda Accord.

content.cn_text: 我去年买的。
content.en_text: I bought it last year.

content.cn_text: 是全新的。
content.en_text: It's brand new.

content.cn_text: Operator：很好，我们已经记录了这个信息。
content.en_text: Operator: Great, we have that information on file now.

content.cn_text: 最后，请提供你的车牌登记号码好吗？
content.en_text: Lastly, could you please provide me with the registration number of your car?

content.cn_text: 这会方便我们找到你的车辆。
content.en_text: This will make it easier for us to locate your vehicle.

content.cn_text: Driver：车牌登记号码是 S232TAT。
content.en_text: Driver: The registration number is S232TAT.

content.cn_text: Operator：谢谢，已经记录下来了。
content.en_text: Operator: Thank you, it's been noted down.

content.cn_text: 如果方便的话，也请告诉我们你的车是什么颜色？
content.en_text: If it's helpful, could you also tell us the color of your car?

content.cn_text: Driver：这辆车原本是红色的，但我妻子最近把它刷成了绿色。
content.en_text: Driver: The car was originally red, but my wife recently painted it green.

content.cn_text: Operator：谢谢你提供这个细节，John。
content.en_text: Operator: Thank you for sharing that detail, John.

content.cn_text: 这肯定有助于识别车辆。
content.en_text: It will definitely help with vehicle identification.

content.cn_text: 现在，请你简单说明发生了什么好吗？
content.en_text: Now, could you please briefly explain what happened?

content.cn_text: Driver：我的车可能快没油了。
content.en_text: Driver: It's possible that my vehicle is running low on oil.

content.cn_text: 我是在上高速后才意识到的，而且找不到加油站。
content.en_text: I only realized it after I began driving on the motorway and couldn't find a gas station.

content.cn_text: 于是我决定驶离高速。
content.en_text: That's when I decided to exit the motorway.

content.cn_text: Operator：明白了。
content.en_text: Operator: I see.

content.cn_text: 我们会确保带一些燃料。
content.en_text: We'll make sure to bring some fuel.

content.cn_text: 请继续。
content.en_text: Please continue.

content.cn_text: Driver：我不熟悉路况，在寻找加油站时，我的车陷进了泥里。
content.en_text: Driver: I wasn't familiar with the road conditions, and when I was searching for a station to refuel my car, I got it stuck in the mud.

content.cn_text: Operator：很遗憾听到这个情况。
content.en_text: Operator: I'm sorry to hear that.

content.cn_text: 你现在在安全位置吗？
content.en_text: Are you currently in a safe location?

content.cn_text: Driver：是的，我在一座桥附近。
content.en_text: Driver: Yes, I'm near a bridge.

content.cn_text: 我看到大约100米外有个路牌，显示这里是 Albany Road。
content.en_text: I spotted a road sign around 100 meters away indicating that it's Albany Road.

content.cn_text: Operator：好的，我们来为你安排援助。
content.en_text: Operator: All right, let's organize assistance for you.

content.cn_text: 有什么紧急情况吗？
content.en_text: Is there any urgency?

content.cn_text: Driver：有，我妈妈背部受伤，无法移动。
content.en_text: Driver: Yes, my mother has a back injury and is unable to move.

content.cn_text: 我想叫救护车，但她拒绝了。
content.en_text: I wanted to call an ambulance, but she refused.

content.cn_text: 她认为自己很快会恢复。
content.en_text: She believes she will recover soon.

content.cn_text: Operator：很遗憾听到你母亲的情况。
content.en_text: Operator: I'm sorry to hear about your mother's condition.

content.cn_text: 我马上派人过去。
content.en_text: Let me dispatch help right away.

content.cn_text: 考虑到距离，我们的机械师大约需要40分钟到达你的位置。
content.en_text: Given the distance, it will take our mechanics approximately 40 minutes to reach your location.

content.cn_text: Driver：谢谢，虽然距离挺远。
content.en_text: Driver: Thank you, although it's quite a distance.

content.cn_text: 我看不到附近有便利店，而且今天风很大。
content.en_text: I can't spot any convenience stores nearby, and the wind is really strong today.

content.cn_text: Operator：我明白。
content.en_text: Operator: I understand.

content.cn_text: 请确保你母亲舒服一些。
content.en_text: Please make sure your mother is comfortable.

content.cn_text: 我的建议是找一个温暖的地方照顾她。
content.en_text: My suggestion is to find a warm place where you can take care of her.

content.cn_text: 你母亲的健康是我们的首要任务。
content.en_text: Your mother's well-being is our top priority.

content.cn_text: Driver：谢谢你的理解和快速回应。
content.en_text: Driver: Thank you for your understanding and prompt response.

content.cn_text: 我真的很感谢你的支持。
content.en_text: I really appreciate your support.

content.cn_text: 如果有任何更新或变化，我会通知你们。
content.en_text: I'll keep you informed of any updates or changes.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1–10

items.title: Address: 116, 1. _______ Road, Salisbury
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问 Address: 116, ______ Road, Salisbury。原文说 Charlecote Road，并拼写为 C-H-A-R-L-E-C-O-T-E，所以答案是 Charlecote。

items.title: Postcode: 2. _______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问 Postcode。原文直接说 postcode is SE13AL，所以答案是 SE13AL。

items.title: Registration number: 3. _______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问 Registration number。原文直接给出 S232TAT，所以答案是 S232TAT。

items.title: Current colour: 4. _______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问 Current colour。原文说原来是 red，但最近 painted it green，所以当前颜色是 green。red 是旧颜色。

items.title: One problem: short of 5. _______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问 One problem: short of ______。原文说车 running low on oil，随后工作人员说会带 fuel。答案可写 oil 或 fuel。

items.title: Current location: stuck in the 6. _______ close to a 7. _______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问 Current location: stuck in the ______。原文说 got it stuck in the mud，所以答案是 mud。

items.title: Current location: stuck in the 6. _______ close to a 7. _______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 close to a ______。原文说 I'm near a bridge，所以答案是 bridge。Albany Road 是路名，100 meters 是距离信息。

items.title: Another problem (his mother): suffering from a 8. _______ problem
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问 his mother suffering from a ______ problem。原文说 mother has a back injury，所以答案是 back。ambulance 是他想叫但母亲拒绝的内容。

items.title: Length of time for mechanics to come: 9. _______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问 mechanics 到达所需时间。原文说 approximately 40 minutes，所以答案是 40 minutes。

items.title: Get a 10. _______ corner to look after his mother
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 Get a ______ corner/place to look after his mother。原文建议 find a warm place，所以答案是 warm。

Details of the Incident

source_label: 🍠@Listening 永不虾滑 · 仅供个人学习
source_credit: 此内容由🍠@Listening 永不虾滑整理，仅作为分享供个人使用；禁止商用、倒卖和引流。有问题请先仔细看🍠这个账号的置顶和分享贴。没有团队，不是机构，纯个人分享。督学和其他相关课程请咨询主页另一个号@心情有点虾滑（不回任何机经相关消息）。
